primary_accounting_issue: Classification IFRS 9 d’un actif financier au regard du critère des flux de trésorerie contractuels constitués uniquement de remboursements de principal et de paiements d’intérêts

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the strict precedence rule and selected IFRS 9 as the sole governing lineage because it directly governs the classification and subsequent measurement of financial assets based on business model and solely payments of principal and interest characteristics.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: low: the context contains only IFRS 9 and it directly addresses the classification question.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern the classification and subsequent measurement categories for financial assets, including assets with solely payments of principal and interest cash flows.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs clarify what principal and interest mean and how the solely payments of principal and interest test is assessed.
These paragraphs constrain and illustrate when contractual features do or do not remain consistent with a basic lending arrangement.
These paragraphs add relevant clarifications for non-recourse and contractually linked instruments when assessing the cash flow characteristics.
This paragraph provides an alternative route to the same fair value through profit or loss measurement basis through the fair value option.

peripheral_authority.reason: These agenda decisions concern the separate equity instrument election context and are not needed to identify the peer approaches for a principal-and-interest debt-type asset.

treatment_families.family: Debt-type financial assets with solely payments of principal and interest held to collect contractual cash flows
Debt-type financial assets with solely payments of principal and interest held both to collect contractual cash flows and to sell
Financial assets measured at fair value through profit or loss, including assets outside the other categories or assets designated to avoid an accounting mismatch

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level measurement category for financial assets whose cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest when the business model is to hold assets to collect those cash flows.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a separate top-level measurement category for financial assets whose cash flows are solely payments of principal and interest when the business model is both collecting and selling.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through profit or loss as the residual and also optionally designated top-level measurement category for financial assets.
